{"data":{"search":"","filterCategory":"","filterStatus":"","sortField":"sort_order","sortDirection":"asc","perPage":12,"selectedItems":[[],{"s":"arr"}],"selectAll":false,"isLoading":false,"isSaving":false,"saveSuccess":false,"showForm":true,"isEditing":true,"itemId":1,"oc_title":"Welcome To Razzaq Engineering Services - RES","oc_description":"Welcome to 
Razzaq Engineering Services (RES Pakistan) is a leading engineering and construction Technical Solution services company in Pakistan, delivering professional, safe, and vibration-free solutions nationwide.
We specialize in advanced RCC Core Cutting Services in Pakistan including any diameter and any depth core drilling, angular coring, industrial coring, stitched core cutting, RCC floor sawing, slab sawing, and RCC wall saw cutting services using modern diamond cutting technology.
Our expert team ensures precision, safety, and damage-free cutting solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial projects across Pakistan.
Our Core Engineering Services Include:
RCC Core Cutting Services (Any Diameter & Depth)
Diamond Core Drilling Services in Pakistan
Angular Core Cutting & Stitched Core Cutting
RCC Floor Saw Cutting & Slab Saw Cutting
RCC Wall Saw Cutting & Structural Cutting
Industrial Core Cutting Services
Controlled Demolition Services in Pakistan
Structural Strengthening & Retrofitting Services:
We are also a trusted contractor for structural retrofitting and building strengthening solutions, including:
Building Strengthening & Structural Repair
Steel Rebar Grouting Services
Chemical Anchoring & Mechanical Anchoring
Epoxy Injection & Chemical Steel Fixing
RCC Concrete Testing Services
Soil Testing & Building Quality Testing
Construction Material Testing Laboratory Services
Waterproofing Solutions in Pakistan
We deliver high-quality engineering solutions at competitive and affordable rates across Pakistan.
Contact Us:
Call 0304-8902805
Call / WhatsApp available","our_company_category":null,"established_year":null,"company_type":null,"is_active":true,"sort_order":0,"oc_image1":null,"oc_image2":null,"oc_image3":null,"oc_image4":null,"image1Preview":"http://127.0.0.1:8000/images/placeholder-company.jpg","image2Preview":"http://127.0.0.1:8000/images/placeholder-company.jpg","image3Preview":"http://127.0.0.1:8000/images/placeholder-company.jpg","image4Preview":"http://127.0.0.1:8000/images/placeholder-company.jpg","ceo_name":null,"ceo_image":null,"ceo_message":null,"ceoImagePreview":"http://127.0.0.1:8000/images/placeholder-ceo.jpg","categories":[["test"],{"s":"arr"}],"showDeleteModal":false,"deleteItemId":null,"deleteItemTitle":""},"memo":{"id":"w7sARFFfjzXUVbDI1Zpi","name":"admin.our-company.our-company-manager","path":"admin/our-companies","method":"GET","release":"a-a-a","children":[],"scripts":[],"assets":[],"errors":[],"locale":"en","islands":[]},"checksum":"c4469b2b01584d8fd181e783342c9f97f065cf3bb85f5031d5b1e702f2092438"}
